page_title: Type 3 Kiryū (Kai) EVA Unit-00 Color Ver.
text:
is a mecha in the Godzilla vs Evangelion collaboration series. It was based on the Mechagodzilla Type 3 (Kai) featured in the film '. It uses the colors of the Evangelion Proto Type-00.

Profile

See complete profile at Godzilla Wikia.

Development

Based in the 2023 / HYPER MODELING set, two miniature figures were used: Godzilla Against Mechagodzilla Mechagodzilla (2002) MFS-3 Type 3 Kiryū and Godzilla: Tokyo S.O.S. Mechagodzilla (2003) MFS-3 Type 3 Kiryū (Kai). https://artspirits.biz/products53.html 

Produced as a miniature of 9cm, as part of the Gekizo Series / HYPER MODELING, it was modeled by 渡辺結樹 (G-tempest) with coloring by 下村広泰 and 増島凪冴. Each figure was sold for ¥3,278 (Including tax) and the box set for ¥13,112 (Including tax). It was released in June 2026. https://artspirits.biz/products70.html 

A limited edition with metallic colors was sold in GODZILLA STORE, Premium Bandai, Tokyo Figure, and the official Art Spirits online shop. https://artspirits.biz/products71.html
